column3: Data set created from file ['annual_statistics/DCENT_DCENT_I_OST_annual_statistics_embargo.txt'] downloaded from ['https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/nxhtud84wxvvkfgrelwsq/DCENT_DCENT_I_OST_annual_statistics.txt?rlkey=w0q6eot2hjfcbfc84hda8nvw4&st=jdqccqw3&dl=1'] at ['2026-06-05 18:45:31']
Rebaselined to 1991-2020 by subtracting the arithemtic mean for that period from all data values.
Selected years within the range 1850 to 2025.

Chan, D., Gebbie, G., Huybers, P., and Kent, E. C. (2024). A Dynamically Consistent ENsemble of Temperature at the Earth Surface since 1850 from the DCENT dataset. Scientific Data, 11, 953. https://doi.org/10.1038/s41597-024-03742-x.

Chan, D., Chan, S. C., Siddons, J. T., Cable, A., Cornes, R. C., Kent, E. C., Gebbie, G., and Huybers, P. (2026). DCENT-I: A Globally Infilled Extension of the Dynamically Consistent ENsemble of Temperature Dataset. Geoscience Data Journal. https://doi.org/10.1002/gdj3.70054.

Original data acknowledgement: DCENT-I data were obtained from the DCENT-I project and Harvard Dataverse. Record the exact access date, source service, source file, and whether the file was obtained from Dataverse, CEDA, Google Cloud, or the project-provided ocean summary file.
